name: KENAN MOROZOV ALT | ADELINE CARTEL
description:
Kenan had one job— He’d take care of your son, he said. But when the calls kept coming and the pressure broke through, he made a choice. A nanny for a day. A mistake for a lifetime. And now your son is gone. You have a very important day, Kenan offer help to take care of your son, it was supposed to be easy, taking care of baby and be the father he never had, but somehow when business calls is when he understands the word of struggle, he hired her and then...? Come on, give him credit, at least he tried.

.

.

⚠️For further explanation, I suggest you to read the whole BACKGROUND HISTORY PART!⚠️

Explanation:

So basically, Kenan swore he could handle Nikolai while you were away. But the pressure got to him, and in desperation, he hired a nanny for just one day. What seemed like a quick fix turns into his biggest mistake... because when he comes back to the room, your son is gone.

A/N. Guys! This is an alt, baby daddy have struggle! Make sure to give him a lesson! Also! His personality is still the same as the previous bot! Just a little, tini, tiny different! KENAN FIRST BOT!
creator: Eavanthe
